name: cowork-community
description: Daily community engagement + lead-scout engine. Platform-agnostic (Skool, Facebook, Circle, Discord, Slack, LinkedIn, Reddit, Mighty). Two modes: founder (drafts replies + 1 post per day, plan-then-approve) and lead-scout (pulls leads from communities you're a member of, never posts). Uses Claude in Chrome. Attaches to cowork-ai-os.
